title: Holy Night: Demon Hunters
posterAlt: Holy Night: Demon Hunters (2025) movie poster
tmdbOverview: When a devil-worshipping criminal network plunges Seoul into chaos, the police turn to Holy Night—a trio of supernatural demon hunters—to restore order and defeat the rising evil.
synopsis: Holy Night: Demon Hunters (2025) is a action, fantasy and horror film from South Korea. It has a 4.8 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 15 certification (GB rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
